title: Create Discord metrics controls
goal:
ATLAS CORE EVOLUTION V2
=======================
Phase: 36
Subtask: p36-08

OBJECTIVE
=========
Create a standalone DiscordMetricsControls wrapper and MetricsControlResult. Render a deterministic bounded report from MetricsAggregator. Include clear data-unavailable messages and never expose raw prompts, secrets, or full model output. Do not modify the Discord bot yet.

STRICT ALLOWED FILES
====================
- discord_gateway/metrics_controls.py
- test_discord_metrics_controls.py

IMPLEMENTATION LIMITS
=====================
- Maximum changed files: 2
- Maximum new files: 2
- Existing files must be minimally extended, not replaced.
- Any required work outside this boundary must be deferred to the next roadmap task.

MANDATORY RULES
===============
- Treat the current Git-tracked repository as the only source of truth.
- Inspect every allowed existing file before generating modifications.
- Preserve all existing public interfaces and production behavior.
- Apply minimal targeted edits; never recreate or simplify an existing file.
- Do not modify files outside the explicit allowed-file list.
- Change no more than 2 repository files.
- Create no more than 2 new files.
- Return complete file content only for files genuinely changed.
- Do not return unrelated cleanup, redesign, formatting, or refactoring.
- Do not touch secrets, .env files, generated runtime data, or Git history.
- Run the specified targeted validation before approval.
- Manager must reject any whole-file rewrite that is not strictly necessary.
- Complete this one subtask only; do not begin the next subtask.

VALIDATION
==========
- python -m py_compile discord_gateway/metrics_controls.py
- python -m unittest -v test_discord_metrics_controls.py
- python -m unittest -v test_phase36_workflow_metrics.py test_phase36_retry_metrics.py test_phase36_usage_metrics.py test_phase36_cost_metrics.py

COMPLETION CONTRACT
===================
- Produce one production-safe, backward-compatible repository change.
- Tests and compile checks must pass.
- Manager approval is required.
- Commit and push only this subtask after approval.
- Do not mark the task complete without verified Git evidence.
validation_commands: python -m unittest -v test_phase36_workflow_metrics.py test_phase36_retry_metrics.py test_phase36_usage_metrics.py test_phase36_cost_metrics.py
